name: Pasta Salad at Its Best
recipeIngredient: 1 can Whole pitted ripe olives (7.75-oz), drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Drop snow peas into boiling water; boil for 1 minute, and remove with a slotted spoon.
2. Place broccoli in boiling water; boil for 1 minute, and drain.
3. Combine peas, broccoli, tomatoes, mushrooms, and olives.
4. Cook pasta according to package directions; drain, and let cool slightly.
5. Combine vegetables, pasta, and 1 tablespoon Parmesan cheese in a large bowl.
6. Add salad dressing and toss well.
7. Chill several hours before serving.
8. Garnish with additional Parmesan cheese, if desired.
9. Serve with Deli Meats and warm French bread.
